name: Piano
description: Enterprise subscription suite for publishers with dynamic paywall, Composer builder, identity, billing and propensity analytics.

seo.title: Piano — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Piano: Enterprise subscription suite for publishers with dynamic paywall, Composer builder, identity, billing and propensity analytics.

when_to_use: Dynamic paywall with propensity scoring for media publishers
Metered access and freemium conversion for news subscriptions
Identity and subscriber billing for enterprise publisher stack

pros: Identity, billing and analytics in one suite
cons: Heaviest fit for publishers, awkward for apps
review.verdict: The blue-chip paywall suite for serious publishers, but crushing overkill if you just need a mobile app paywall.
review.best_for: News and media publishers running sophisticated subscription funnels.
review.not_for: Mobile apps or SMBs needing lightweight paywalls.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
